hero.subheadline: ForgeFlow orchestrates specialized AI workers across your codebase. Frontend, backend, mobile, and review — each scoped, coordinated, and token-efficient.

howItWorks.heading: How ForgeFlow works
howItWorks.subheading: Four steps from task to merged code.

steps.title: Classify
steps.description: The supervisor reads your task and identifies which surfaces it touches — web, backend, or mobile — then activates only the workers that are needed.

steps.title: Inspect
steps.description: The repo-inspector maps the relevant files, existing patterns, and risks before a single line of code is written.

steps.title: Implement
steps.description: Scoped workers execute in parallel within their surface. Frontend never touches backend. Mobile never touches web. Each worker ends with a completion marker.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: A dedicated reviewer agent inspects only the diff and directly related contracts. Flags regressions, gaps, and quality issues — then stops.

features.heading: Built for real codebases
features.subheading: No guesswork. No scope creep. No wasted tokens.

items.title: Strict Scope Rules
items.description: Frontend workers never touch backend files. Mobile workers never touch web files. Contamination is structurally impossible.

items.title: Inspect Before Implement
items.description: A repo-inspector maps relevant files and risks before any code is written. Every change is grounded in what actually exists.

items.title: Token Efficiency
items.description: Workers read only what they need. No full-repo scans. Summaries over restating. Fast and cheap at scale.

items.title: Multi-Surface Coordination
items.description: Web, backend, and mobile workers coordinate through a file-based message bus. The supervisor activates only what the task needs.

items.title: Dark Mode and i18n
items.description: Every UI surface ships with dark mode and multilingual support baked in from the first commit.

items.title: Reviewer in the Loop
items.description: A dedicated reviewer inspects diffs and flags regressions, parity gaps, and quality issues — without rewriting a thing.

cta.heading: Ready to forge your workflow?
cta.subheading: Join teams shipping faster with structured AI agents.

footer.tagline: Structured AI agents for real codebases.
